/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/RobotSimulator.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/RobotSimulator.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RobotSimulator.dir/RobotSimulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RobotSimulator.dir/MessageQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RobotSimulator.dir/TopicRegistry.cpp.o -o RobotSimulator  libsensorBuffer.a
